query: how do I set up a deployment pipeline in Fabric so my Sales semantic model moves from Dev workspace to Test then Prod automatically?
why: Core intent: Fabric deployment pipelines promoting content dev->test->prod.

query: we keep editing reports straight in the production workspace and breaking stuff. whats the right way to stage changes before they go live?
why: Describes need for separate dev/test/prod environments and ALM staging without naming the feature.

query: I want to save my .pbix as .pbip with TMDL so I can commit the model metadata to our git repo and do proper code reviews
why: Source-control-friendly formats (.pbip/TMDL) and Git integration are squarely in scope.

query: Need to configure deployment rules so the connection string points to the test SQL server in the test stage and the prod server in prod
why: Deployment rules within deployment pipelines is an explicit in-scope task.

query: we're retiring our old SSRS reports and moving everything to Power BI, whats a good high level migration plan and rollout order?
why: High-level migration from a legacy BI platform (SSRS) is explicitly called out.

query: should I use Fabric git integration, azure pipelines, or just publish from desktop for promoting our finance models between environments?
why: Choosing a deployment/publish mechanism across environments is core scope.

query: how do I use the TMDL view in Power BI Desktop to script and back up changes to my date dimension before applying them?
why: Using the TMDL view to script/preview/apply/back up model metadata is in scope.

query: running the six lifecycle stages plan develop validate deploy support retire for our customer churn model — what checklist do I follow at each stage?
why: The six content-lifecycle stages are a central in-scope framework.

query: how many workspaces should we have for our BI content and how do report and model workspaces link across the stages?
why: Deciding number of environments and how report/model workspaces link across stages is in scope.

query: I separated the report from the semantic model into a thin report pbip and now I need to promote both through test to prod without breaking the binding
why: Separating report from model plus promotion across environments; competes with optimizing-model but lifecycle/promotion wins.

query: how do I publish my finished dashboard to a workspace and share it with the marketing team via an app with the right viewer roles?
why: Sharing/apps/roles is publishing-and-sharing-content, not lifecycle promotion.

query: our tenant admin needs to lock down which users can export data and review the audit logs across all workspaces
why: Tenant settings/auditing/governance is administering-and-governing.

query: the prod report is super slow on a 4GB model, how do I reduce model size and use Performance Analyzer to find the bottleneck?
why: Performance tuning is optimizing-model-performance, not lifecycle/deployment.

query: I need dynamic RLS so regional managers only see their own territory's sales when the report is in production
why: Row-level security setup is securing-row-level-access, despite the production mention.

query: set up scheduled refresh for my model through the on-prem data gateway after I deploy it
why: Gateway/refresh config is connecting-data-sources; deploy is incidental.

query: how do I embed this Power BI report in our internal React portal and automate exports with the REST API?
why: Embedding + REST automation is embedding-and-automating.

query: write me the DAX measure for YTD sales vs prior year that I'll use in the model I'm about to ship
why: Time-intelligence DAX is applying-time-intelligence; shipping is incidental.

query: build the relationships and set cross-filter direction in my star schema before I promote it anywhere
why: Modeling relationships/cardinality is modeling-semantic-data, not deployment.

query: I want to endorse our certified semantic model and set up a subscription so execs get the report by email every Monday
why: Endorsement/subscriptions/sharing is publishing-and-sharing-content.

query: in Power Query I need to clean and merge the raw CSV staging files and make sure query folding still works before the model is finalized
why: Power Query M cleaning/query folding is transforming-data-power-query.
